series_metadata.series_description: Records monitoring an individual''s compliance with Alternative Program requirements imposed by Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years from the date the Board takes action releasing monitored individual from Board requirements, or from date individual is terminated for failure to comply with requirements, unless record is needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years from the date the Board takes action releasing monitored individual from Board requirements, or from date individual is terminated for failure to comply with requirements, unless record is needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
